sn23.3:1.1: Sāvatthinidānaṁ. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā rādho bhagavantaṁ etadavoca: "‘bhavanettinirodho, bhavanettinirodho’ti, bhante, vuccati. Katamā nu kho, bhante, bhavanetti, katamo bhavanettinirodho"ti?
sn23.3:1.2: "Rūpe kho, rādha, yo chando yo rāgo yā nandī yā taṇhā ye upayupādānā cetaso adhiṭṭhānābhinivesānusayā – ayaṁ vuccati bhavanetti. Tesaṁ nirodho bhavanettinirodho.
sn23.3:1.3:
Vedanāya … saññāya … saṅkhāresu … viññāṇe yo chando … pe … adhiṭṭhānābhinivesānusayā – ayaṁ vuccati bhavanetti. Tesaṁ nirodho bhavanettinirodho"ti.
Tatiyaṁ.
